---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for susshi
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow that's currently painful.

> e.g. "When I manage 200+ servers, there's no way to filter by connection mode — I have to scroll through the whole list."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like susshi to do. Be as specific as possible about the UX (keybinding, new TUI panel, config key, etc.).

## Config impact

If the feature requires a new `~/.susshi.yml` key or changes an existing one, show what the config would look like:

```yaml
# proposed addition
defaults:
  new_option: value
```

If there's no config impact, write: *No config change required.*

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or any other relevant context.
